Container.Name: cups-avahi-airprint
Container.Overview:
Fork of chuckcharlie/cups-avahi-airprint with added support for HP LaserJet host-based printers not covered by the standard foomatic drivers.
CUPS AirPrint server with Avahi mDNS advertisement. Makes any USB or network printer available as an AirPrint printer to iPhones, iPads, and Macs.
Added in this fork: - HP LaserJet P1005, P1006, P1505 and other ZJS/host-based printers via foo2zjs/foo2hp (not included in foomatic by default)
Also includes: - Brother laser printers (brlaser) - Epson, Canon and others (gutenprint) - Samsung (splix)
Must run on host network for AirPrint multicast to work. Access the web UI at http://[NAS-IP]:631 to add and configure printers.

Config.Name: Config Path
Config.Description: Persistent storage for printer config, PPD files and cupsd.conf.

Config.Name: CUPS Admin User
Config.Description: Username for the CUPS admin interface at http://[NAS-IP]:631.

Config.Name: CUPS Admin Password
Config.Description: Password for the CUPS admin interface.

Config.Name: Avahi Hostname
Config.Description: mDNS hostname Avahi will advertise. Change this if you have multiple instances or conflicts with the NAS mDNS daemon (common on Unraid, Synology, TrueNAS).
